calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:41am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Maxine Laidlaw appears in pro per. Respondent, Emily Richardson appears through her attorney Blair Greenburg, and witness Jennifer Redding.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA (1) Yellow folder, packet of information regarding case

11:26am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted. Ms. Greenburg is requested to file a substitution of attorney as soon as possible.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Continued To Dec-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:14am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Maxine Laidlaw appears in pro per. Respondent, Emily Richardson, appears through Kathy Richardson (mother) and Jennifer Redding (room mate) appearing in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

Documents handed to Judge Myles by Respondent are not marked but have been retained.

Case is continued to December 2, 2010. Parties waive notice of date and time.

10:36am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Continued To Jul-23-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
